zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Shirley於大約1255年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾莎莉時，他的父親James Shirley27歲，母親Agnes de Walton28歲。他於大約1289年與Margaret De Waldeshef在英國英格蘭德比夏爾莎莉結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾廷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Shirley于大约1255年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾莎莉时，他的父亲James Shirley27岁，母亲Agnes de Walton28岁。他于大约1289年与Margaret De Waldeshef在英国英格兰德比夏爾莎莉结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾廷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Shirley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so named, such as Shirley (Warwickshire), Shirley in Millbrook (Hampshire), Shirley (Surrey), Shirley in Owston (Yorkshire), and Shirley (Derbyshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English scīr ‘bright’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though some may have scīr ‘district, shire’ as the initial element if they lie on a boundary; for example, the Warwickshire place lies on the Warwickshire-Worcestershire boundary. The name Shirley first appears in Ireland in the late 17th century, following the granting of lands to a Shirley family in the barony of Farney, Monaghan.

History: William Shirley (1694–1771) was born in Sussex, England, and came to MA in 1731. He rose in the colonial service, was appointed governor in 1741, and was responsible for the British capture of the French fortress of Louisbourg, Cape Breton Island, in 1745.

variants.name: Sherley
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shirley  .
Americanized form of Norwegian Sjøli or Sjølie: habitational name from a farmstead named with sjø ‘sea, lake’ + li ‘hillside’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Shirley was born about 1255, in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, James Shirley, was 27 and his mother, Agnes de Walton, was 28. He married Margaret De Waldeshef about 1289, in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1327, at the age of 73, and was buried in Ettington, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Shirley est né environ 1255, à Shirley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Shirley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Walton, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Waldeshef environ 1289, à Shirley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1327, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Ettington, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Shirley um 1255 in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Shirley 27 und seine Mutter Agnes de Walton 28. Er hat um 1289 in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret De Waldeshef geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1327 im Alter von 73 Jahren und wurde in Ettington, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Shirley è nato il circa 1255 nel Shirley, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, James Shirley, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Walton, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Waldeshef circa 1289, nel Shirley, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1327, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Ettington, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Shirleyが約1255年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルリーで生まれた時，父James Shirleyは27歳，母Agnes de Waltonは28歳であった。約1289年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルリーでMargaret De Waldeshefと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年に73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアエッティントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Shirley(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 실를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Shirley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Walton(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 실를리에서 Margaret De Waldeshef(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 틴그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Shirley nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Shirley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Shirley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Walton, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Waldeshef aproximadamente 1289, em Shirley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1327, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Ettington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Shirley родился около 1255 г. в местности ширли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени James Shirley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Walton, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Waldeshef около 1289 г. в местности ширли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1327 г. в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности эттингтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Shirley nació aproximadamente 1255, en Shirley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James Shirley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes de Walton, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret De Waldeshef aproximadamente 1289, en Shirley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1327, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Ettington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
